items.text: Account contradiction: `fasrc_reference.md` still lists `kempner_undergrads`; MEMORY.md says it was replaced by `kempner_nsaphra_lab` and gone as of 2026-06-11. Update the reference file?

Description-vs-body staleness in `lm_scale_carving_corrected.md`: description still says "distinct-per-iter is REFUTED" and "the open A1 test", but the body itself corrects both ("REFUTED is an overclaim — report nesting as positive evidence"; "Sub-question B ANSWERED 2026-06-08"). Body also still says `carving_distinctness.py` is "to be written" while later text treats it as existing. Left as found.
Naming inconsistency: "iter-0 redundancy basin" (`v7_research_orientation.md`, `sparseloop_general_goal.md`) vs "iter-1 redundancy" (`v7_stage_b_axes.md` description, MEMORY.md line). Left as found.
Env-activation tension: MEMORY.md Key Facts activates `$LABDIR/conda_envs/base`; `fasrc_reference.md` points at the (now-missing) looping venv. Possibly both-valid contexts; left as found.

Successor repo `looping/looping_machines` is rb-managed (has `CHANGELOG.md` + `RESEARCH_STATE.md`): this store predates that; whether its result-bearing files (lm_scale_*, v7_*) should defer to the ledger is a governance question, not this pass's.
